LanguageData.EE_AcuteKidneyInjury.description: 因肾血流灌注不足引发的急性肾损伤（AKI）。导致机体血液过滤与排酸能力大幅下降。
LanguageData.EE_AcuteKidneyInjury.label: 急性肾损伤
LanguageData.EE_AcuteKidneyInjury.stages.0.label: 隐性
LanguageData.EE_AcuteKidneyInjury.stages.1.label: 轻度
LanguageData.EE_AcuteKidneyInjury.stages.2.label: 重度
LanguageData.EE_AcuteKidneyInjury.stages.3.label: 极危
